en: Now there was a famine in the land, besides the former famine that was in the days of Abraham. And Isaac went to Gerar to Abimelech king of the Philistines.
zh: 從前在亞伯拉罕的時候，曾經有過一次饑荒，現在那地又有饑荒，以撒就到基拉耳去，到非利士人的王亞比米勒那裡。

en: And the LORD appeared to him and said, "Do not go down to Egypt; dwell in the land of which I shall tell you.
zh: 耶和華向以撒顯現，說：“你不要下到埃及去，要住在我所指示你的地方。

en: Sojourn in this land, and I will be with you and will bless you, for to you and to your offspring I will give all these lands, and I will establish the oath that I swore to Abraham your father.
zh: 你要寄居在這地，我必與你同在，必賜福給你，因為我要把這全地都賜給你和你的後裔，履行我向你父親亞伯拉罕所起的誓。

en: I will multiply your offspring as the stars of heaven and will give to your offspring all these lands. And in your offspring all the nations of the earth shall be blessed,
zh: 我必使你的後裔增多，好像天上的星那樣多；我必把這全地都賜給你的後裔；地上的萬國都必因你的後裔得福。

en: because Abraham obeyed my voice and kept my charge, my commandments, my statutes, and my laws."
zh: 這是因為亞伯拉罕聽從了我的話，遵守了我的吩咐、我的命令、我的條例和我的律法。”

en: So Isaac settled in Gerar.
zh: 於是，以撒就住在基拉耳。

en: When the men of the place asked him about his wife, he said, "She is my sister," for he feared to say, "My wife," thinking, "lest the men of the place should kill me because of Rebekah," because she was attractive in appearance.
zh: 那地方的人問起他的妻子，他就回答：“她是我的妹妹。”因為他不敢說：“她是我的妻子。”他心裡想：“恐怕這地方的人，因利百加的緣故把我殺了，因為她容貌美麗。”

en: When he had been there a long time, Abimelech king of the Philistines looked out of a window and saw Isaac laughing with Rebekah his wife.
zh: 以撒在那裡住了很久。有一天，非利士人的王亞比米勒從窗戶裡向外觀望，看見以撒正在愛撫他的妻子利百加。

en: So Abimelech called Isaac and said, "Behold, she is your wife. How then could you say, 'She is my sister'?" Isaac said to him, "Because I thought, 'Lest I die because of her.'"
zh: 亞比米勒於是把以撒召了來，對他說：“你看，她實在是你的妻子，你怎麼說是你的妹妹呢？”以撒回答他：“因為我心裡想：‘恐怕我因她的緣故喪命。’”

en: Abimelech said, "What is this you have done to us? One of the people might easily have lain with your wife, and you would have brought guilt upon us."
zh: 亞比米勒說：“你向我們作的是甚麼事呢？人民中間險些有人與你的妻子同睡，那你就把我們陷在罪惡裡了。”

en: So Abimelech warned all the people, saying, "Whoever touches this man or his wife shall surely be put to death."
zh: 於是，亞比米勒吩咐全國人民，說：“凡是觸犯這人或是他的妻子的，必被處死。”

en: And Isaac sowed in that land and reaped in the same year a hundredfold. The LORD blessed him,
zh: 以撒在那裡耕種，那一年豐收百倍，耶和華實在賜福給他。

en: and the man became rich, and gained more and more until he became very wealthy.
zh: 他就日漸昌大，越來越富有，成了個大富翁。

en: He had possessions of flocks and herds and many servants, so that the Philistines envied him.
zh: 他擁有羊群、牛群和很多僕人，非利士人就嫉妒他。

en: (Now the Philistines had stopped and filled with earth all the wells that his father's servants had dug in the days of Abraham his father.)
zh: 他父親亞伯拉罕在世的時候，所有由他父親僕人挖的井，非利士人都塞住了，填滿了土。

en: And Abimelech said to Isaac, "Go away from us, for you are much mightier than we."
zh: 亞比米勒對以撒說：“你離開我們去吧，因為你比我們強大得多了。”

en: So Isaac departed from there and encamped in the valley of Gerar and settled there.
zh: 以撒於是離開那裡，在基拉耳谷支搭帳棚，住在那裡。

en: And Isaac dug again the wells of water that had been dug in the days of Abraham his father, which the Philistines had stopped after the death of Abraham. And he gave them the names that his father had given them.
zh: 他父親亞伯拉罕在世的時候，僕人所挖的水井，在亞伯拉罕死後都被非利士人塞住了。以撒重新挖掘這些井，仍然照著他父親所起的名字叫它們。

en: But when Isaac's servants dug in the valley and found there a well of spring water,
zh: 以撒的僕人在山谷裡挖井，在那裡挖得一口活水井。

en: the herdsmen of Gerar quarreled with Isaac's herdsmen, saying, "The water is ours." So he called the name of the well Esek, because they contended with him.
zh: 基拉耳的牧人與以撒的牧人爭鬧起來，說：“這水是我們的。”以撒就給那井起名叫埃色，因為他們與他相爭。

en: Then they dug another well, and they quarreled over that also, so he called its name Sitnah.
zh: 以撒的僕人又挖了另一口井，他們又為這井爭鬧起來，因此以撒給這井起名叫西提拿。

en: And he moved from there and dug another well, and they did not quarrel over it. So he called its name Rehoboth, saying, "For now the LORD has made room for us, and we shall be fruitful in the land."
zh: 以撒離開那裡，又挖了另一口井；他們不再為這井爭鬧了，他就給那井起名利河伯，因為他說：“現在耶和華給我們寬闊的地方，我們必在這裡繁盛起來了。”

en: From there he went up to Beersheba.
zh: 以撒從那裡上到別是巴去。

en: And the LORD appeared to him the same night and said, "I am the God of Abraham your father. Fear not, for I am with you and will bless you and multiply your offspring for my servant Abraham's sake."
zh: 那天晚上，耶和華向他顯現，說： “我是你父親亞伯拉罕的 神； 你不要怕，因為我與你同在； 我必為了我僕人亞伯拉罕的緣故， 賜福給你，使你的後裔增多。”

en: So he built an altar there and called upon the name of the LORD and pitched his tent there. And there Isaac's servants dug a well.
zh: 以撒就在那裡築了一座祭壇，呼求耶和華的名；又在那裡支搭帳棚；以撒的僕人也在那裡挖了一口井。

en: When Abimelech went to him from Gerar with Ahuzzath his adviser and Phicol the commander of his army,
zh: 亞比米勒和他的朋友亞戶撒，以及他的軍長非各，從基拉耳來到以撒那裡。

en: Isaac said to them, "Why have you come to me, seeing that you hate me and have sent me away from you?"
zh: 以撒問他們：“你們既然恨我，把我從你們中間趕出來，為甚麼又到我這裡來呢？”

en: They said, "We see plainly that the LORD has been with you. So we said, let there be a sworn pact between us, between you and us, and let us make a covenant with you,
zh: 他們回答：“我們實在看見耶和華與你同在，因此我們想：‘不如我們雙方起誓。’讓我們與你立約吧；

en: that you will do us no harm, just as we have not touched you and have done to you nothing but good and have sent you away in peace. You are now the blessed of the LORD."
zh: 你不要傷害我們，正如我們從來沒有觸犯你，只有善待你，讓你平平安安地離開。現在你是蒙耶和華賜福的了。”

en: So he made them a feast, and they ate and drank.
zh: 以撒就為他們擺設筵席，他們就一起吃喝。

en: In the morning they rose early and exchanged oaths. And Isaac set them on their way, and they departed from him in peace.
zh: 第二天，他們清早起來，彼此起誓；以撒就送他們走，他們平平安安地離開他走了。

en: That same day Isaac's servants came and told him about the well that they had dug and said to him, "We have found water."
zh: 那一天，以撒的僕人來把他們挖井的事告訴他，說：“我們找到水了。”

en: He called it Shibah; therefore the name of the city is Beersheba to this day.
zh: 以撒就給那井起名叫示巴，因此那城名叫別是巴，直到今日。

en: When Esau was forty years old, he took Judith the daughter of Beeri the Hittite to be his wife, and Basemath the daughter of Elon the Hittite,
zh: 以掃四十歲的時候，娶了赫人比利的女兒猶滴，和赫人以倫的女兒巴實抹為妻。

en: and they made life bitter for Isaac and Rebekah.
zh: 她們二人常使以撒和利百加傷心難過。
